/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/CTSBuild.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTSBuild.dir/external/stb/stb_image.cpp.o -o CTSBuild  libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so -lglfw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libassimp.so.5.3.0 -lGLU -lm -lpthread -ldl -lpugixml
